headline: Cadence Deepens AI System Design Push With Hexagon Deal And NVIDIA Alliance
summary: Cadence Design Systems (NasdaqGS:CDNS) has completed its acquisition of Hexagon AB’s Design and Engineering division, adding new capabilities in system design and engineering. The company also expanded its collaboration with NVIDIA to integrate Cadence tools with AI and accelerated computing for design workflows. These moves deepen Cadence’s Intelligent System Design focus and are intended to bring AI driven solutions to semiconductor and broader system design markets. Cadence already sits...
